name: kubed-io/drupal-n8n-integration
description: Integration tests (Behat) for the n8n Drupal module. Isolated from the module's root composer so Behat's dependencies never constrain the module itself, and so a Drupal site can require the module without dragging Behat in. phpunit is here only for PHPUnit\Framework\Assert, which the step definitions assert with — Behat ships no assertion library of its own. The constraint spans 11-13 deliberately: phpunit 13 needs PHP >=8.4.1 but this module supports >=8.3, so a fixed ^13 would lock out contributors on our own stated floor. Composer resolves the newest phpunit each PHP can run, and Assert is stable across all three.
